verse_text: What purpose then does the law serve? It was added because of transgressions, till the Seed should come to whom the promise was made; and it was appointed through angels by the hand of a mediator.

links.context: Our basic mortal condition is manifested in sin. We are born mortal; we then become sinful. Thus does death "sting" us before we die. Being a Christian is more than having one's sins forgiven or being good; it is being alive. The law is not sinful, but it exposes sin. And, since it does not provide the power to obey it, it increases sinfulness in unchanged humans ([[ROM.3:20]]; 4:15; 5:13, 20; 7:7; [[GAL.3:19]]-22).
